name: GitHub · Change is constant. GitHub keeps you ahead.
snippet: The future of building happens together Tools and trends evolve, but collaboration endures. With GitHub, developers, agents, and code come together on one platform.

name: Download music, movies, games, software! The Pirate Bay - The
snippet: Download music, movies, games, software and much more. The Pirate Bay is the galaxy's most resilient BitTorrent site.

name: Releases · git/git - GitHub
snippet: You can create a release to package software, along with release notes and links to binary files, for other people to use. Learn more about releases in our docs.

name: GitHub Pages - Eric Zimmerman's tools
snippet: Use -NetVersion to control which flavor of tool you get: 4 for .net 4.6.2 or 9 for .net 9 (recommended!), or 0 for all versions. Default is 9 All GUI tools will be updated to use .net 9 only but the legacy net4 version will be kept in place as well (just not updated anymore)

name: OpenClaw Community | What’s everyone running their claw off
snippet: What’s everyone running their claw off ? I never looked at AI but just before Christmas I bought a rtx12gb 64gb dominator ram pc to explore it . Just for kicks .. I went through anything lm lmstudio...
